meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use an Antigravity project template to overcome the 'no portfolio' hurdle. An intermediate tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code for success.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is solved by shipping high-impact, functional prototypes that demonstrate architectural maturity. By leveraging an Antigravity project template with Claude Code, you bypass boilerplate fatigue, allowing you to focus on complex logic and system design—the exact skills senior engineering leads look for in junior hires.
content.intro:
You stare at a blank GitHub profile, the silence of an empty commit history echoing the anxiety of the job hunt. Every job description demands three years of experience you haven't had the chance to earn, and the 'no portfolio' wall feels like an impenetrable fortress. You know you have the drive, but the industry demands proof of competence, not just a promise of potential.

This is where the Antigravity project template changes the game. We are going to bypass the tedious scaffolding phase and jump straight into high-level engineering. By combining the structural integrity of Antigravity with the rapid iterative power of Claude Code, you won't just be writing scripts; you will be shipping production-grade architecture that turns heads during technical interviews.

steps.title: Initialize the Architectural Foundation
steps.description: Establish the project structure using the Antigravity template to ensure scalability and clean separation of concerns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity base template, including modular routing and state management.

steps.title: Define Core Business Logic
steps.description: Translate your app's core value proposition into a schema that Claude Code can interpret and execute.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust service layer for a user-authentication and data-fetching module following strict RESTful principles.

steps.title: Implement Type-Safe API Endpoints
steps.description: Ensure your data layer is bulletproof by generating type-safe interfaces that prevent runtime errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a type-safe API endpoint generator that handles error logging and input validation automatically.

steps.title: Integrate Unit Testing Suite
steps.description: Senior developers judge portfolios by test coverage. Automate your testing to demonstrate professional rigor.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive Jest testing suite covering edge cases for the main business logic components.

steps.title: Deploy to Production Environment
steps.description: Move your code from local to cloud, proving your ability to manage the full software development lifecycle.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the deployment pipeline for a production-ready environment using the Antigravity cloud provider settings.

pro_tips: Always commit your architectural decisions in a README.md; employers hire for the 'why' behind your code, not just the 'what'.
Use Claude Code to refactor your code for performance; optimized loops and O(n) logic are major signals of senior potential.
Document your failures in the pull request history; showing how you debugged a complex issue is a powerful interview asset.
Implement a 'Feature Flag' system early, even in small projects, to demonstrate your understanding of professional release management.
Focus on one 'hero' feature that solves a real-world problem rather than building five 'to-do list' style applications.
content.next_steps: Once your project is live, write a blog post detailing the engineering challenges you solved and link it directly in your GitHub bio. This transforms your code from a static repository into a narrative of your technical growth.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer a student waiting for an opportunity; you are an AI Builder with a live, production-ready portfolio. The gap between where you are and where you want to be is just one project away. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
